title: Podcast: Colin Angle discusses building companion robots with Familiar Machines & Magic
title_zh: 播客：Colin Angle 与 Familiar Machines & Magic 探讨打造陪伴机器人
abstract:
iRobot co-founder Colin Angle talks about his latest venture, creating next-gen social robots with Familiar Machines. 
 The post  Podcast: Colin Angle discusses building companion robots with Familiar Machines & Magic  appeared first on  The Robot Report .
abstract_zh: iRobot 联合创始人 Colin Angle 谈论他的最新创业项目，与 Familiar Machines 共同打造下一代社交机器人。本文源自《The Robot Report》的播客内容。
tldr_zh: iRobot 联合创始人分享打造下一代社交机器人的新创业项目。
cover_zh: iRobot 创始人再创业｜这次要做能陪伴你的社交机器人
